title: Amtech 900mm x 12mm Security Cable Lock with Built-in LED Combination, T1835, Black
features: LED COMBINATION LOCK: This security bike lock cable has a combination lock with built-in LED lights for use in dark conditions
SECURE AND NON-SCRATCHING: The braided, hardened steel cable is 900mm long with a 12mm diameter and has a protective vinyl sleeve to prevent scratching
BATTERIES INCLUDED: The kit is supplied with 2 Lithium CR927 3V batteries
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains LED Combination Cable Lock See more
